title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — crm-integration-receipt.json (Skill 62, P12-CRM)
description: The P12-CRM artifact CWFE-MANIFEST.json declares ('crm-integration-receipt.json (GHL forms/calendars/workflows event proof)'). Produced by the GHL delegation rail (06-ghl-install-pages + 44-convert-and-flow-operator, spec 14.1) for a live run, or by an approved offline mock (spec 17.6/19.2). scripts/prove_conversion.py (the P12 gate) treats this as EVIDENCE, never as the verdict — it re-derives every conversion decision from the LOCKED content-manifest.json cta_map and the materialized site's own conversion wiring on disk, exactly like every other prove_*.py in this skill. Records secret presence by NAME only (spec 14.3/20): env var NAMES and safe resource identifiers, never a secret VALUE.

provider.description: GoHighLevel, branded Convert and Flow for clients (spec 14.1). The one GHL delivery rail is Skill 6; this engine never grows its own GHL build client.

location_id.description: GHL location identified by SAFE identifier only (spec 14.3 'location ID by safe identifier'). Alnum/_/- so a path-traversal or secret-shaped value cannot pass; prove_conversion additionally secret-scans the whole receipt.

delegated_to.description: The GHL delivery/automation skills this receipt's work was delegated to (spec 14.1: 06-ghl-install-pages + 44-convert-and-flow-operator).

secret_names.description: Names ONLY of the env vars holding the client's GHL webhook/embed secrets (spec 20 'record secret presence by name only'). Never a value.

conversion_actions.description: Every wired conversion CTA. prove_conversion cross-checks each against the LOCKED content-manifest.json cta_map's own parsed ConversionAction (kind + env var NAME / href + required fields must all agree) and against the materialized site's site-data.generated.ts — a receipt claiming a CTA the locked map does not validly wire is rejected fail-closed.

env_var_name.description: Required for kind ghl-form-embed / ghl-webhook: the env var NAME (never the URL/value) the site resolves server-side (lib/resolve-ghl-embeds.ts / app/api/conversion-event/route.ts).

satisfies.description: Which content-manifest.conversion_requirements this CTA fulfils. prove_conversion asserts every required capability is covered by a valid, wired action.

ghl_resource.description: The GHL form/calendar/workflow/webhook/payment resource id this CTA drives (spec 14.3 'form/calendar/widget IDs; workflow/webhook IDs'). A safe identifier, never a secret.

conversion_event_proof.description: Spec 17.6: prove 'success state, and error state through real E2E tests or approved mocks'. UTM propagation (spec 13.3) is proven on the success path.

mode.description: 'approved-mock' for an offline deterministic run (spec 19.2 mocked fixtures, no live paid/CRM call); 'live-e2e' for a real sandbox conversion.

utm.description: The UTM params that rode through to the conversion event (spec 13.3 'UTM preservation'). Keys are the canonical utm_source/medium/campaign/term/content set.

error_state.description: A deliberately-invalid submission (a required field withheld) that the conversion wiring rejects fail-closed (the /api/conversion-event route's 400 path) — proving the error state, not just the happy path.

cleanup.description: Spec 14.3: 'test contact ID created during E2E test, if allowed; cleanup result'.
